keyMessages: WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
Pathways programs help educators identify a challenge, choose a pathway, and continue learning through partnership.
WCEPS supports schools and districts with educational resources, assessments, professional learning, program evaluations, and content alignment analyses.
proofPoints: WCEPS is described on the Pathways site as a 501(c)(3) charitable nonprofit organization.
The site says WCEPS extends the impact of University of Wisconsin-Madison educational innovations.
brief.layoutRecommendation: Use a structured one-pager with a summary column, key message cards, evidence-backed proof points, and a bottom CTA band.

headlineOptions: Customized support for schools and districts
subheadOptions: Pathways Powered by WCEPS helps education teams chart a course through research-based resources, professional learning, assessments, program.
WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
copy.body: WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs. For education leaders, this draft focuses on research-based educational supports and service pathways. WCEPS is described on the Pathways site as a 501(c)(3) charitable nonprofit organization.
bullets: WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
Pathways programs help educators identify a challenge, choose a pathway, and continue learning through partnership.
WCEPS supports schools and districts with educational resources, assessments, professional learning, program evaluations, and content alignment.
WCEPS is described on the Pathways site as a 501(c)(3) charitable nonprofit organization.
The site says WCEPS extends the impact of University of Wisconsin-Madison educational innovations.
copy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

fittedCopy.headline: Customized support for schools and districts
fittedCopy.deck: Connect teams with research-based resources, professional learning, assessments, and alignment support.
proofPoints: Tailored research-based products and services support unique education needs.
Pathways help educators identify a challenge, choose a pathway, and continue learning through partnership.
Support includes educational resources, assessments, professional learning, program evaluations, and content alignment.
fittedCopy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

compositionTemplate.typographyScale: magazine headline, one deck, short proof rail
compositionTemplate.artPlateTreatment: edge-to-edge editorial art column or band
compositionTemplate.copyPlacement: large type block with compact editorial proof band

designRecipe.hierarchy: editorial one-pager with a dominant service headline, concise supporting deck, compact proof band for evidence, and a clear action point anchored below
designRecipe.artDirection: confident K-12 leadership editorial: optimistic, research-driven, and partner-focused, using polished school-and-district context imagery with strategic cropping, institutional credibility, and warm professional energy suited to education leaders
designRecipe.placeholderStrategy: build the layout through image-led negative space, tonal separation, and directional composition that naturally reserves the left reading column and lower proof rhythm without fake text or containers
designRecipe.appComposition: app places the official logo at top-left, headline and deck in the left text column, then a compact proof band with CTA beneath; imagery occupies the right field and should feel integral to the page concept
promptDirectives: design the entire letter-portrait one-pager concept, not just the background
use right-field editorial imagery that conveys district and school partnership, planning, and support for educators
create a clean left reading column through crop, lighting, and contrast for app-owned text
support an integrated lower proof-band rhythm without drawing boxes, cards, or UI-like modules

compositionScore.question: Would I send this to the WCEPS team without apology?
warnings: WCEPS prompt is missing avoid guardrail(s): diploma, fake university logo, mascot.

layoutQa.question: Would I send this layout to the WCEPS team without apology?
issues: Proof copy is too tall for the selected template.

copyQualityQa.question: Would I send this copy to the WCEPS team without apology?

visualQa.question: Would I send this visual system to the WCEPS team without apology?

renderQa.question: Would I send this rendered artifact to the WCEPS team without apology?

modelQa.question: Would a senior WCEPS reviewer send this artifact without apology?

imageResults.revisedPrompt: Portrait full-page marketing art plate for a WCEPS education-sector campaign, designed as a full-bleed editorial composition with a clear left reading column reserved by lighting, crop, and tonal contrast, and a richer visual field on the right. No readable text anywhere. No logos, wordmarks, initials, seals, badges, arrows, chevrons, charts, panels, cards, or UI. Create a premium institutional nonprofit education atmosphere: confident K-12 leadership, research-informed support, district and school collaboration, inclusive learning environment, and practical service pathways. Visual story: a polished school-district planning moment with educators and district leaders reviewing resource packets, strategy materials, and notes in a bright but realistic office or school setting; show human collaboration and professional learning without close-up faces or detailed hands. Use layered depth, directional composition, tonal separation, and elegant negative space to imply an app-owned headline/deck zone on the left, a compact proof-band rhythm below it, and an action area without any actual type. Color palette should align with deep navy, teal, aqua, and green accents (#142836, #0081A4, #3EB3BD, #5EA974) balanced with warm neutral light. Style: authentic editorial photography with refined design treatment, crisp and polished, NY media/ad-agency quality, useful density, warm institutional, clean, credible, and finished. Keep important visual energy away from trim edges; create a portrait campaign art plate with strong hierarchy, type-safe contrast zones, and an optimistic research-driven school-and-district partnership narrative. Avoid generic meeting-table clichés, washed-out fades, posed workshop stock photography, over-specific sub-brand cues, or abstract logo-like patterns.

request.topic: research-based educational supports and service pathways
request.notes: Use the parent brand without over-describing individual programs.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: Discover your pathway through WCEPS' research-based educational resources, publications, assessments, professional learning, program evaluations, and content alignment analyses.
sourceEvidence.label: Homepage positioning

sourceEvidence.excerpt: We are a non-profit committed to supporting educators in K-12 and higher education in their mission to support students and create an educational landscape where all students, regardless of their background, can thrive and reach their full potential.
sourceEvidence.label: Nonprofit purpose

sourceEvidence.excerpt: The Wisconsin Center for Education Products and Services is a 501(c)3 charitable non-profit organization with a mission to extend the impact of the University of Wisconsin-Madison's educational innovations and bring research-based, innovative, and customized educational solutions to schools and districts.
sourceEvidence.label: WCEPS mission footer

sourceEvidence.excerpt: As a non-profit organization offering research-based solutions, we strive to listen to what our district colleagues need, understand your challenges, and consider how our programs can help you reach your goals, without pushing things you don't need.
sourceEvidence.label: Contact page tone
